description: Post-Flash Exhaustive Self-Test — 81 hardware correctness tests (DR independence, ALU, shifts, branches, BFEXT/BFINS, TPERM, CHANGE, LOAD). DR0=0 on full pass, DR0=N on first failure.

capabilities.name: Boot.Thread.E
capabilities.note: Boot.Thread E-GT (NS[1]) — Church domain enter; used for TPERM E tests in Sections I/J/K/L

capabilities.name: Mint.E
capabilities.note: Mint E-GT (NS[6]) — Church domain enter; GT lifecycle manager (placed at slot 2 because NS slot 2 was freed)

capabilities.name: Boot.Abstr.E
capabilities.note: Boot.Abstr E-GT (NS[3]) — Church domain enter; used in TPERM E tests for Sections I/J/K/L

capabilities.name: Salvation.E
capabilities.note: Salvation E-GT (NS[4]) — Church domain enter; used to test the first callable abstraction path

capabilities.name: Navana.E
capabilities.note: Navana E-GT (NS[5]) — Church domain enter; namespace table writer

capabilities.name: Boot.Nucs.X
capabilities.note: Boot.Thread X-GT (NS[1], Turing X-perm) — nucleus execute; used in TPERM X tests for Sections I/J

author: Church Machine
